title: What can people do to combat climate change? Bill Nye says 'vote'
description: The United Nations is holding its Climate Week in New York where scientists and advocates are meeting to discuss climate change. University of Pennsylvania Distinguished Professor of Earth and Environmental Science Michael Mann and science educator Bill Nye join Katy Tur to react to Helene and to share what people can do to combat climate change.
bodyText: The Last Word with Lawrence O'Donnell The Last Word with Lawrence O'Donnell All In with Chris Hayes
